text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Flower! Hey, you're going for the Triple
Tiara, right?

text_block_list.name: Flower's Friend
text_block_list.text:
I saw your special on TV the other day! Everyone's
got their eyes on you. I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Mmm-hmm, mmm! ♪ Grow nice and big, little flower. ♪

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Why, someone's in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sky?! When did you get here?!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
A while ago. The shade of those trees over there
was so nice, and watching you skip around made
me really sleepy, you see.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! I sound like an excited little kid! Please
forget everything you just saw!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Aha. C'mon, no need to get embarrassed. You've
been killing it on the track.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
People're even saying you're gonna win the whole
Tiara tour this year.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm really lucky to be where I am. When they came
to interview me and Trainer the other day, I was
super happy! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I have to work even harder—for Trainer's sake
too!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: For your trainer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
You're really something else. I mean, that's really all
there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hmm?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Still, you should take a page outta my book and
relax every once in a while. There's no need to
fuss over every little thing.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Besides, even little flower buds are beautiful.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, what do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
...By the way, Spe skips around too, so don't
worry about seeming childish or whatever.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: And that's what happened.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I wonder what Sky was trying to tell me.
choice_data_list:
Maybe she was advising you not to push
yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: That makes sense. She's really kind.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll do my best... to not do more than my
best today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After our break, I have Nishino Flower run as she
pleases in order to see where her current abilities
lie.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... Phew...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having entered her classic year, she's still at a
physical disadvantage. But now we know how to
accommodate, and she doesn't get as fatigued as
she did post-debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, if she continues with the Tiara tour, her
next race will be the 2,400-meter Japanese Oaks.
In her current condition, I'm not sure if her
stamina will last...
Yeah! BIG BAKU! SHIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Bakushin, at your service! But just call me
Sakura Bakushin O!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O is in the same year as Nishino
Flower, and she seems to have her sights set on
becoming an exemplary racer. I think.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: As the class representative, I'm here to conduct research on the racer everyone's got their eyes on! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Everyone?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: ...D-do you mean me?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Who else would I be talking about?
Right, Zephyr?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
...Huh? Zephyr?! Oh no! I took my eyes off of her
again!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Zephyyyr!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What should we do, Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I think Bakushin ran off this way...
How refreshing...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Hm? Did you hear something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh...

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
You're enveloped in such a refreshing breeze. It's
ever so soothing.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Z-Zephyr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yamanin Zephyr, a racer constantly shrouded in a
mysterious aura, appears as suddenly as a visiting
gust of wind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ran in the G1 Sprinters Stakes last year and is
now proving to be a formidable racer in sprints
and miles.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, there you are! I had a feeling you'd come
back to the roof!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You'll get lost again if you keep wandering off!
Please stick close to me—as class rep, it's my duty
to help out!
choice_data_list: (How can she get lost within the academy?)

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
This place is excellent for feeling the breeze. But I
was just thinking of heading to the track.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text: Flower... I simply wished to feel your wind.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I was watching you run from up here. You were so
wonderfully fast, just like a cutting gale.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it's like you really understand what it
means to be Bakushin! You'll be a great Bakushin
flower—I just know it!

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
Yes. And when that blossom finally blooms, we
will face each other on the track.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She says that like it'll be a future inevitability, but
both Yamanin Zephyr and Sakura Bakushin O are
mainly running miles and sprints.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As things are, Nishino Flower's path probably
won't cross with theirs.

text_block_list.name: Yamanin Zephyr
text_block_list.text:
I have more to look forward to now. I hope we
can run against each other someday.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
But first, we need to go on an exemplary walk
together, Zephyr! Set a good example for
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
And Flower! I'm counting on you to help me out
with homework again!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Uh... What was that all about?
choice_data_list: I think they came to praise you.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What?! There's no way!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Still, I'm happy they said such nice things about
me. Ehehe.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I'm fine the way I am now.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: I feel ready to take on the Oka Sho. ♪
